description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior walls are primarily white, with large windows on the front facade allowing natural light into the interior. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence enclosing a small, landscaped yard featuring a prominent pink-blossomed tree, shrubs, and a stone path leading to the main entrance. The roof includes a green section, possibly a rooftop garden or turf, and a skylight. The entryway is simple, with a blue door and no porch or overhang, and the yard gate aligns with the stone path. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced landscaped yard featuring a pink-blossomed tree and stone path.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white exterior, large front windows, and a partial view of the fenced yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, blue door, stone path, and the landscaped yard with a prominent pink-blossomed tree.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the flat roof, green rooftop section, and the full extent of the fenced yard and garden.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the plain white wall, small window, and the green rooftop section, with the yard and trees visible beyond the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple blue door with no porch or overhang, accessed by a stone path through a wooden gate
